document_metadata.title: PCI DSS v4.0 Self-Assessment Questionnaire — SAQ-D (Service Provider)
document_metadata.assessment_type: Automated static analysis + manual code review
document_metadata.note: This SAQ is produced by automated scanner + threat model analysis. A QSA review is required before formal attestation.

requirements.title: Install and Maintain Network Security Controls

controls.description: Inbound traffic to CDE restricted to necessary communications
controls.evidence: FastAPI accepts connections on :8000; no explicit ingress firewall rules verified in codebase
controls.remediation: Configure reverse proxy (nginx) to allowlist payment endpoint IPs; block all non-HTTPS traffic at network perimeter

controls.description: Outbound traffic from CDE restricted to necessary communications
controls.evidence: LLM gateway makes outbound HTTPS calls to Gemini/Claude — payment data must not traverse this path
controls.remediation: Apply PAN scrubbing before any LLM call; restrict payment agent tasks to on-premise Ollama only

requirements.title: Apply Secure Configurations to All System Components

controls.description: Configuration standards developed for all system components
controls.evidence: config/config.yaml exists; payment-specific security config (auth, pii, encryption) not enforced as production defaults
controls.remediation: Add SAGE_ENV=production guard that fails startup if auth.enabled=false or pii.enabled=false

controls.description: All non-console admin access encrypted with strong cryptography
controls.evidence: JWT auth implemented in src/core/auth.py; TLS depends on reverse proxy configuration
controls.remediation: Enforce HTTPS redirect in application layer; add HSTS header

controls.description: SAD (CVV/CVC, full magnetic stripe) not retained post-authorization
controls.evidence: No CVV scrubbing or deletion confirmation found in payment processing path. pii.enabled: false allows CVV to persist in audit_log.db
controls.remediation: Add CVV to pii_filter blocked patterns. Confirm CVV deleted from memory after processor response. Add automated test: assert no CVV in audit log after charge.

controls.description: SAD not retained after completion of authorization
controls.evidence: Full payment payloads stored in audit_log.db input_context without PAN masking or encryption
controls.remediation: Tokenize PAN at API ingress (TOKEN-001). Enable pii.enabled: true with PAN patterns.

controls.description: PAN rendered unreadable anywhere it is stored
controls.evidence: SQLite audit_log.db has no field-level encryption; chroma_db vector store has no CHD encryption
controls.remediation: Implement Fernet AES-256 field encryption on CHD columns. Enable encryption.at_rest: true in config.yaml.

controls.description: Primary Account Number secured with strong cryptography
controls.evidence: No encryption at application layer; filesystem-level LUKS not confirmed
controls.remediation: Use AES-256 with keys managed via KMS (AWS KMS or HashiCorp Vault). Rotate keys annually minimum.

requirements.title: Protect Cardholder Data with Strong Cryptography During Transmission

controls.description: Strong cryptography used to safeguard PAN during transmission
controls.evidence: Reverse proxy (nginx) provides TLS 1.2+. HTTPSRedirectMiddleware not present in api.py for direct deployments.
controls.remediation: Add HTTPSRedirectMiddleware. Set HSTS max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload. Document minimum TLS version requirement.

controls.description: Inventory of trusted keys and certificates maintained
controls.evidence: Certificate management outside scanner scope
controls.remediation: Document TLS certificate inventory; automate rotation via Let's Encrypt or AWS ACM

requirements.title: Protect All Systems and Networks from Malicious Software

controls.description: Anti-malware mechanisms perform periodic scans
controls.evidence: Host-level antivirus outside scanner scope
controls.remediation: Deploy ClamAV or commercial AV on payment API hosts; schedule daily scans

requirements.title: Develop and Maintain Secure Systems and Software

controls.description: Software engineering practices prevent introduction of vulnerabilities
controls.evidence: payload_validator.py and parameterized queries reduce injection risk. Static scanner in security_audit/ directory.
controls.remediation: Integrate payment_security_scanner.py into CI/CD pipeline. Add Bandit and Semgrep to pre-commit hooks.

controls.description: All software components protected from known vulnerabilities via security patches
controls.evidence: requirements.txt has 18+ unpinned dependencies. No pip-audit in CI.
controls.remediation: Pin all dependencies. Add pip-audit --requirement requirements.txt to CI. Rotate patched versions within 30 days of CVE publication.

controls.description: Public-facing web applications protected against known attacks
controls.evidence: Missing X-Frame-Options, CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options headers. Wildcard CORS.
controls.remediation: Implement SecurityHeadersMiddleware (see HDR-001). Fix CORS-001.

requirements.title: Restrict Access to System Components and Cardholder Data by Business Need to Know

controls.description: All access to system components and cardholder data is assigned minimum necessary privileges
controls.evidence: No dedicated /payment/* routes with RBAC Depends() enforcement found in api.py
controls.remediation: Define payment routes with Depends(require_permission(Permission.PAYMENT_WRITE)). Restrict charge operations to operator/admin roles.

controls.description: Access assigned based on least-privilege, job function
controls.evidence: RBAC roles defined in src/core/rbac.py; payment-specific PAYMENT_WRITE permission not yet defined
controls.remediation: Add Permission.PAYMENT_WRITE and Permission.PAYMENT_READ to RBAC enum. Assign only to operator/admin roles.

requirements.title: Identify Users and Authenticate Access to System Components

controls.description: User IDs and authentication credentials are managed
controls.evidence: JWT auth implemented in src/core/auth.py. auth.enabled: false by default — must be enforced true in production.
controls.remediation: Enforce auth.enabled: true at startup for any internet-facing deployment. Block high-value ops when auth is off.

controls.description: Passwords/passphrases meet minimum complexity and length requirements
controls.evidence: API key generation in src/core/api_keys.py uses SHA-256 without salt (CRYPT-001 from base scan)
controls.remediation: Switch to HMAC-SHA256 with secret key or bcrypt/argon2 for API key storage

controls.description: MFA implemented for all access to the CDE
controls.evidence: No MFA enforcement in JWT claims or auth middleware
controls.remediation: Require amr=mfa JWT claim for all charge operations > configurable threshold. Integrate with OIDC provider supporting MFA.

requirements.title: Restrict Physical Access to Cardholder Data

controls.description: Physical access controls for CDE infrastructure
controls.evidence: Physical security outside software scanner scope
controls.remediation: Document data center physical access controls; include in annual PCI DSS assessment

requirements.title: Log and Monitor All Access to System Components and Cardholder Data

controls.description: Audit logs capture all individual user access to cardholder data
controls.evidence: AuditLogger present with INSERT-only pattern. No PAYMENT_CHARGE or PAYMENT_REFUND event types wired in api.py.
controls.remediation: Add payment-specific audit events: PAYMENT_CHARGE_INITIATED, PAYMENT_CHARGE_COMPLETED, PAYMENT_REFUND_REQUESTED, PAYMENT_AUTH_FAILURE. Include actor, IP, masked PAN, amount, trace_id.

controls.description: Audit log files protected to prevent modifications
controls.evidence: audit_logger.py uses INSERT-only schema; no UPDATE/DELETE operations present

controls.description: Daily review of security events and logs
controls.evidence: Log review process outside scanner scope
controls.remediation: Configure log aggregation (ELK/CloudWatch) with alerts on PAYMENT_AUTH_FAILURE and anomalous charge volumes

controls.description: Audit log history retained for at least 12 months
controls.evidence: SQLite audit_log.db has no automated retention/archiving policy
controls.remediation: Export audit_log.db to S3 WORM bucket nightly. Enforce 12-month retention policy.

requirements.title: Test Security of Systems and Networks Regularly

controls.description: Internal vulnerability scans performed at least quarterly
controls.evidence: Static scanner (payment_security_scanner.py) available. No scheduled execution in CI.
controls.remediation: Add `python security_audit/payment_gateway/payment_security_scanner.py` to weekly CI schedule. Alert on any CRITICAL/HIGH finding.

controls.description: Penetration testing methodology defined and implemented
controls.evidence: security_audit/pentest_plan.yaml defines methodology, test cases, and acceptance criteria

controls.description: External penetration test performed at least annually
controls.evidence: No pentest results file found
controls.remediation: Schedule annual external pentest. Map results to security_audit/payment_gateway/pci_dss_saq.json.

requirements.title: Support Information Security with Organizational Policies and Programs

controls.description: Risk assessment performed at least annually
controls.evidence: security_audit/payment_gateway/payment_threat_model.yaml and threat_model.yaml with residual risk register

controls.description: Hardware and software technologies reviewed annually
controls.evidence: SBOM at security_audit/payment_gateway/payment_sbom.json. Pin versions to enable automated CVE tracking.
controls.remediation: Schedule annual SBOM review; use pip-audit for continuous monitoring

controls.description: Security awareness program reviewed annually
controls.evidence: Training program outside scanner scope

pci_blocking_issues.action_required: Enable pii.enabled: true; add CVV to blocked patterns; confirm delete-after-auth
Implement Fernet/AES-256 field encryption; enable encryption.at_rest: true
Integrate PCI-certified token vault; never accept raw PAN at API layer
